category_sources: Official PyInstaller repository says it freezes/packages Python programs into stand-alone executables.
source_facts.description says "Bundle a Python application and all its dependencies".
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use the name PyInstaller.
docs_sources: Official PyInstaller manual is hosted at https://pyinstaller.org/.
repo_sources: Official PyInstaller GitHub organization controls pyinstaller.org and pins pyinstaller/pyinstaller as the code repository.
tags_sources: Official repository describes stand-alone executable packaging.
source_facts.description identifies bundling Python apps and dependencies.
source_facts.executables includes pyinstaller and related packaging tools.
